display.purpose: Bahnschrift-led hero and section orientation statements.

body.purpose: Atkinson Hyperlegible-led explanations and operational evidence.

data.purpose: Cascadia Code-led indices, contracts, and route coordinates.

motion.name: route-ease
motion.purpose: Short state changes and tactile button lift.

components.name: Main Unknown Decision Map
components.description: Pairs each recognizable task condition with its Code Territory Guide mode around one explicit central question.
components.css: .ds-mode-map { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 1.12; } .ds-mode-route { position: absolute; width: 42%; min-height: 24%; border: 1px solid currentColor; } .ds-mode-core { position: absolute; inset: 34% 31%; text-align: center; }

components.name: Operating Model Disclosure
components.description: Keeps detailed policy available without extending the essential landing-page journey.
components.html:
How scope and completion are protected
Detailed operating policy
components.css: .ds-deep-dive { border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.16 0.02 342); } .ds-deep-dive summary { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 2rem; padding: 1.35rem 0; cursor: pointer; font: 720 1.6rem/1.05 Bahnschrift, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; list-style: none; } .ds-deep-dive summary::after { content: '+'; color: oklch(0.27 0.055 350); font-family: 'Cascadia Code', Consolas, monospace; } .ds-deep-dive[open] summary::after { content: '−'; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-button-primary { background: white; color: oklch(0.27 0.055 350); padding: .75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid white; border-radius: .35rem; font: 800 1rem/1.5 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', 'Trebuchet MS', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.57 0.08 188); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Mode Tab
components.description: Selects the task statement closest to the main uncertainty.
components.css: .ds-mode-tab { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2.3rem 1fr; min-height: 5rem; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 1rem 1.2rem; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.012 342); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.16 0.02 342); text-align: left; font: 780 1rem/1.5 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', 'Trebuchet MS', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-mode-tab[aria-selected='true'] { background: oklch(0.39 0.07 350); color: white; } .ds-mode-tab:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.57 0.08 188); outline-offset: -4px; }

components.name: Capability Control
components.description: Explains one independently authorized delivery level.
components.css: .ds-capability { min-height: 7.5rem; padding: 1rem .65rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.27 0.055 350); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.27 0.055 350); font: 850 1rem/1.4 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', 'Trebuchet MS', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-capability[aria-pressed='true'] { background: oklch(0.27 0.055 350); color: white; } .ds-capability:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.57 0.08 188); outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview: A precise field instrument: curious enough to invite exploration, rigorous enough to support a decision, and transparent about what is or is not known.

rules.name: Quiet Signal
rules.body: Muted berry anchors the hero and selected states while supporting sections remain neutral.

rules.name: Essentials End
rules.body: Visitors can understand and install the skill without opening detailed policy.

rules.name: One Viewport
rules.body: Each primary desktop chapter fits one screen; mobile never clips content to imitate that rhythm.

rules.name: Instrument Label
rules.body: Labels identify real controls, states, or evidence.

dos: Provide visible focus and reduced motion.
donts: Do not use repetitive SaaS feature-card grids.
Do not imply deterministic checks are behavioral evidence.
